name: UpdateAvailabilityRequest
description: Implementation of the 'UpdateAvailabilityRequest' model. This is the update avaialability request coming DTO

AvailabilityIds.description: Unique IDs for the availabilities or unavailabilities.

PublicDisplay.description: Choice that decides whether the availablity should be publicly visible, masked or hidden.

DaysOfWeek.description:
The days of week to update the availabilities or unavailabilities.
Default: **All**

ProgramIds.description: The program Id to be set for the availabilities. Default: **All**

StartDateTime.description: The start date and time for the availabilities or unavailabilities.

EndDateTime.description: The end date and time for the availabilities or unavailabilities.

LocationId.description: The location Id to be updated for the provided availability Ids.

UnavailableDescription.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

Test.description: When `true`, the request ensures that its parameters are valid without affecting real data. When ``false`, the request performs as intended and may affect live client data. Default: **false**
